Petition By Claimant To Determine Ownership Of Estate Real And Personal Property And For Order Directing Executor To Transfer Estate Real And Personal Property To Petitioner
Off Calendar Nov-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Kay for (petitioner) Genentech, Inc. Richard Luftman, Guardian ad Litem (via court call). Daniel Lorenzen (via court call) for (executor) Tracy Morris.

The Court stated that it now has declarations regarding the consent for the minors and confirmed that there are no objections. The Court granted the petition by Claimant to Determine Ownership of Estate Real and Personal Property, etc., (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
